nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Paeonia Lactiflora Bark/(Chrysanthemum Indicum/Honeysuckle) Flower/(Forsythia Suspensa/Poncirus Trifoliata) Fruit/(Angelica Dahurica/Angelica Gigas/Hibiscus Syriacus/Licorice/Lithospermum Erythrorhizon/Scutellaria Baicalensis/Sophora Flavescens/Ulmus Davidiana) Root Extract
chemicalDescription: Paeonia Lactiflora Bark/(Chrysanthemum Indicum/Honeysuckle) Flower/(Forsythia Suspensa/Poncirus Trifoliata) Fruit/(Angelica Dahurica/Angelica Gigas/Hibiscus Syriacus/Licorice/Lithospermum Erythrorhizon/Scutellaria Baicalensis/Sophora Flavescens/Ulmus Davidiana) Root Extract is the extract of the bark of Paeonia lactiflora, the flowers of Chrysanthemum indicum and Lonicera japonica (Honeysuckle), the fruit of Forsythia suspensa and Poncirus trifoliata, and the roots of Angelica dahurica, Angelica gigas, Hibiscus syriacus, Glycyrrhiza uralensis (Licorice), Lithospermum erythrorhizon, Scutellaria baicalensis, Sophora flavescens, and Ulmus davidiana.
inciName: PAEONIA LACTIFLORA BARK/(CHRYSANTHEMUM INDICUM/HONEYSUCKLE) FLOWER/(FORSYTHIA SUSPENSA/PONCIRUS TRIFOLIATA) FRUIT/(ANGELICA DAHURICA/ANGELICA GIGAS/HIBISCUS SYRIACUS/LICORICE/LITHOSPERMUM ERYTHRORHIZON/SCUTELLARIA BAICALENSIS/SOPHORA FLAVESCENS/ULMUS DAVIDIANA) ROOT EXTRACT
